step_rationale: MMP-3 degrades extracellular matrix and is anchor-adjacent (with MMP-9, MMP-2) in cap rupture.
mechanism: MMP-3 degrades fibrous-cap collagen and proteoglycans, promoting plaque destabilization and rupture.
